title: Move items before due date arrives - automation
excerpt:

posts.author: Yeela (Yeela Scop)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I would like to ask for an automation I don’t believe exists and would be very useful for me.

“xx days before due date, move item to group yy”

I currently have 2 groups of tasks, one of them includes all the tasks that must be done this week, and the other group includes long-term tasks pool. Would be nice to have the ability to move items automatically from the long-term pool to the “must do” group.

Would appreciate your help!

Thanks
Yeela

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think this one will do the job, just use “When date arrives, move item to group” and set arrival x amount of days before due date.

image743×278 9.59 KB

posts.author: Yeela (Yeela Scop)
posts.cookedHtml: Oops I guess I missed it, super! thanks!
